name: Brownie Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a boil.
2. Add the cocoa and stir until completely dissolved.
3. Let cool to room temperature.
4. In a bowl, combine all remaining ingredients except the nuts according to your bread machine's instructions.
5. Select the raisin bread setting.
6. Start the machine.
7. Add the walnut pieces at the beeper.
